paragraphs: Whether you’re building in a development or working with an architect, adding a fireplace to your new-home plan is a step you shouldn’t skip.
Whether you’re looking to learn more about venting options or simply curious about the technology behind direct vent, this guide will walk you through everything to consider about fireplace venting.
Everything you need to know about electric fireplaces, from how they operate to installation options.

Discover the latest trends in fireplace design and placement. From modern wall-mounted options to multi-room installations, find out how to choose the right fireplace for your home and its intended purpose, whether for warmth, ambiance, or both.
A seamless blend of fire and tech: see how Stellar created the ultimate modern fireplace and TV wall.
Lance Anderson's Prior Lake home showcases a custom Stellar fireplace that blends modern design with functional precision, serving as the centerpiece of his living space.

Dive into the stylish world of HGTV's Rock the Block. From organic modern to tropical retreats, discover how top designers transform living spaces with innovative fireplace designs. Unlock fresh decorating ideas and practical tips to elevate your home.
Discover how the right fireplace front can elevate any design style, from modern farmhouse to transitional.
Learn how to infuse comfort and coziness into a spec space with pro tips from architect and DIYer Christine Nickerson.
A hearth industry veteran defines the most puzzling fireplace phrases so you can better understand your project.
Give your fireplace surround a major makeover with tile. From warm and inviting colors to mix-and-match patterns, the possibilities are endless.
Many homeowners want to mount televisions above their fireplaces. But is that smart? Learn what’s possible in this blog from Heat & Glo.
Fireplaces in homes aren’t just for colder climates anymore.
From contemporary, sleek designs to more traditional looking fireplaces, linear fireplaces offer something for everyone.
What to know when choosing a recessed electric fireplace, from budget options to luxury looks.
Blogger and new home buyer Rachael Dorr walks us through her fireplace selection process.
How to streamline the planning process and create the home of your dreams.
Real estate agents break down which upgrades add value to your new construction home.
Planning to add a hearth to your home? Here’s what it costs to purchase, install and run a fireplace—whether it’s gas, electric or wood-burning.
8 ways to warm up to wooden fireplace surrounds.
Warmth isn’t the only reason adding a gas fireplace is a sound investment.
Run your new fireplace through a burn-off cycle before you start using it regularly.
Gas fireplaces aid your household bottom line by being inexpensive to operate and incredibly efficient, helping reduce your gas bills.
Whether you want a gas fireplace for an existing or new home, consider these factors before you buy.
A power outage can put your furnace out of commission, but many fireplaces and stoves can provide much-needed heat amidst the storm.
It’s possible to enjoy a single fireplace both inside and outside your home!
Direct vent fireplaces remain a popular choice because of their efficiency, safety and flexibility. Let us break down how they work!
Whether you are adding a fireplace to an existing home or having one installed in a newly constructed space, consider these important questions first.
